description_long: This is a slice of carrot cake with three visible layers of moist, brown cake separated by thick, creamy white frosting. The top of the cake is covered with a smooth layer of white icing and is decorated with a small, detailed carrot made from orange and green fondant or marzipan. The cake sits on a simple, flat, white plate with a polygonal edge. The cake's sides reveal the distinct separation between the cake and frosting layers, giving it a rich and appetizing appearance. The overall finish is clean and slightly glossy, with the decorative carrot adding a playful touch. The cake appears freshly cut and ready to be served.
description: A three-layer carrot cake slice with white frosting and a decorative carrot on top, displayed on a white plate. The cake has a moist, brown interior and smooth, creamy exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triangular cake slice with the decorative carrot and leaves centered on top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the three distinct cake and frosting layers, with the carrot decoration visible on the top left.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the smooth, fully frosted back of the cake slice and the carrot decoration from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again displaying the three cake layers and the carrot decoration on the top right.
